Symbol.Script_2D:
! SAB_QR_Etikett_7 - Capmo-Schild: Ticket-ID + Status live vom Quader, ! QR auf weissem Feld, Mikro-URL mit deckendem Untergrund in Textbreite. pen qrpen fill qrfill msz = A / qrn
hotspot2 0, 0 hotspot2 A, 0 hotspot2 A, A hotspot2 0, A
l1_ = tickettxt l2_ = "" uu_ = qrurl ! PROPVAL-Konstanten sind SKRIPT-definiert (aus Graphisofts Property Label), ! KEINE GDL-Builtins — ohne Definition waeren sie 0 und der Typvergleich scheitert still! PROPVAL_BOOL = 1 PROPVAL_INT = 2 PROPVAL_REALNUM = 3 PROPVAL_STRING = 4 dim pv1_[] dim pv2_[] dim pv3_[] ty1_ = 0 ty2_ = 0 ty3_ = 0 da_ = 0 db_ = 0 r1_ = request ("Property_Value_Of_Parent", pgid1, ty1_, da_, db_, pv1_) ! Ticket Kurztext r2_ = request ("Property_Value_Of_Parent", pgid2, ty2_, da_, db_, pv2_) ! Ticket Status r3_ = request ("Property_Value_Of_Parent", pgid3, ty3_, da_, db_, pv3_) ! Capmo-Link if r1_ > 3 and vardim1(pv1_) > 0 then if ty1_ = PROPVAL_STRING then l1_ = "Ticket ID: " + pv1_[1] else l1_ = "Ticket ID: " + str(pv1_[1], 10, 0) endif endif if r2_ > 3 and vardim1(pv2_) > 0 then if ty2_ = PROPVAL_STRING then l2_ = "Status: " + pv2_[1] else l2_ = "Status: " + str(pv2_[1], 10, 0) endif endif if r3_ > 3 and vardim1(pv3_) > 0 then if ty3_ = PROPVAL_STRING then if strlen (pv3_[1]) > 0 then uu_ = pv3_[1] endif endif
mm_ = GLOB_SCALE / 1000 ! Ticket-Text skaliert mit der Schildbreite (passt bei jedem Massstab) th_ = A * txtfac tmm_ = th_ / mm_ uh_ = urlmm * mm_ sh_ = uh_*3 ! Hoehe der weissen URL-Zeile x1_ = -2*msz x2_ = A + 2*msz
! Stile frueh definieren — stw() fuer die URL-Untergrund-Breite braucht den Stil define style "sabqr_big" AC_TextFont_1, tmm_, 7, 0 define style "sabqr_url" AC_TextFont_1, urlmm, 4, 0
! URL-Breite in Modell-m (stw liefert Papier-mm) — ubgfak = Kalibrierfaktor set style "sabqr_url" uw_ = stw (uu_) / 1000 * GLOB_SCALE * ubgfak ux2_ = x1_ + msz + uw_ + msz if ux2_ < x2_ - msz*0.5 then ux2_ = x2_ - msz*0.5
if bgon then y1_ = -2*msz - sh_ - msz y2_ = A + 3*msz + th_*2.6 poly2_b 4, 6, bgpen, bgpen, x1_,y1_,1, x2_,y1_,1, x2_,y2_,1, x1_,y2_,1 ! Weisses QR-Feld inkl. Ruhezone poly2_b 4, 6, whitepen, whitepen, -msz,-msz,1, A+msz,-msz,1, A+msz,A+msz,1, -msz,A+msz,1 ! Weisse URL-Zeile: deckend in voller TEXT-Breite (ragt ueber das Schild hinaus) poly2_b 4, 6, whitepen, whitepen, x1_+msz*0.5,-2*msz-sh_,1, ux2_,-2*msz-sh_,1, ux2_,-2*msz,1, x1_+msz*0.5,-2*msz,1 endif
pen qrpen set style "sabqr_big" if strlen (l2_) > 0 then text2 -msz, A + 2*msz + th_*1.25, l1_ text2 -msz, A + 2*msz, l2_ else text2 -msz, A + 2*msz, l1_ endif
! QR-Module (j=7: Rahmen + Fuellung + GESCHLOSSEN — ohne Bit 4 gilt das ! Polygon als offen und Archicad zeichnet die Fuellung still nicht) if qrn >= 21 then for rw_ = 0 to qrn-1 yy2 = A - rw_ * msz yy1 = yy2 - msz cl_ = 0 cs_ = -1 while cl_ <= qrn-1 do i = rw_ * qrn + cl_ gosub "getbit" if bt_ = 1 and cs_ < 0 then cs_ = cl_ lc_ = 0 if cl_ = qrn-1 then lc_ = 1 if (bt_ = 0 or lc_ = 1) and cs_ >= 0 then ce_ = cl_ if bt_ = 1 and lc_ = 1 then ce_ = qrn xx1 = cs_ * msz xx2 = ce_ * msz poly2_b 4, 7, qrpen, qrpen, xx1,yy1,1, xx2,yy1,1, xx2,yy2,1, xx1,yy2,1 cs_ = -1 endif cl_ = cl_ + 1 endwhile next rw_ endif
set style "sabqr_url" text2 x1_ + msz, -2*msz - sh_/2, uu_
if dbgon then text2 -msz, -2*msz - sh_ - msz - uh_*2, "DBG r1=" + str(r1_,3,0) + " r2=" + str(r2_,3,0) + " r3=" + str(r3_,3,0) + " t1=" + str(ty1_,3,0) + " bits=" + str(strlen(qrbits1),4,0) + " qrn=" + str(qrn,3,0) endif end
"getbit": ix_ = int(i / 250) p_ = i - ix_ * 250 + 1 s = "" if ix_ = 0 then s = qrbits1 if ix_ = 1 then s = qrbits2 if ix_ = 2 then s = qrbits3 if ix_ = 3 then s = qrbits4 if ix_ = 4 then s = qrbits5 if ix_ = 5 then s = qrbits6 if ix_ = 6 then s = qrbits7 if ix_ = 7 then s = qrbits8 if ix_ = 8 then s = qrbits9 if ix_ = 9 then s = qrbits10 bt_ = 0 if p_ <= strlen(s) then if strsub(s, p_, 1) = "1" then bt_ = 1 endif return
